gtscales 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Create a continuous gtscales spec

gtscale_spec_continuous.Rd

Create a continuous gtscales spec

Usage

gtscale_spec_continuous(
  column,
  palette = NULL,
  domain = NULL,
  breaks = NULL,
  labels = scales::label_comma(),
  title = NULL,
  direction = "to right",
  width = "160px",
  height = "14px",
  fn = NULL
)

Arguments

column

A column to target.

palette

A vector of colors used in the scale.

domain

Optional numeric limits. If omitted, these can be inferred when the spec is applied to a gt table.

breaks

Optional numeric break values for the legend.

labels

A labeling function or character vector for the legend.

title

Optional legend title.

direction

CSS gradient direction. Defaults to "to right".

width

Width of the legend bar.

height

Height of the legend bar.

fn

Optional scales function for numeric coloring.

Value

A gtscale_spec.
